autorizaciones.title: Authorisations
autorizaciones.admin_intro: Create, publish and sign authorisations (outing, house rules…). The legal text is set by the centre.
autorizaciones.family_intro: Read and sign your children's outing authorisations.
autorizaciones.aviso_legal: Simple electronic signature with an evidentiary record (name, stroke, text hash, date, IP). Its legal validity is pending legal review.

lista.vacia_familia: You have no pending or signed authorisations.

form.texto_placeholder: Paste the real legal text here (or a test one).
form.texto_legal_aviso: This is the text that gets signed and hashed: only change it before any signatures exist.
form.texto_definitivo: Mark text as final (required to publish and sign)

firma.pad_ayuda: Draw your signature with your finger or mouse
firma.no_firmable: This authorisation is not available to sign.
firma.ya_firmado: You have already signed this authorisation.
firma.confirmo: I have read the text and expressly authorise what it states.
firma.nombre_ayuda: It must match the name on your profile.
firma.presencial_aviso: Management mode: the signature is recorded with paper backing, without a drawn signature. Confirm you hold the document physically signed by the family.
firma.revocar_contactar: To cancel a signature already made, contact the centre.
firma.revocar_aviso: Revoking will alert the management and the class teachers.

roster.sin_ninos: No children fall under this authorisation.

detalle.texto_no_definitivo: The text is not marked as final yet: it cannot be published or signed.
detalle.es_plantilla: Catalog format: it is not signed; it is sent to an audience (or started by the family).

errors.nino_no_encontrado: The child doesn't exist or isn't accessible.

errors.plantilla_no_publicada: The format is not published or not final.

errors.medicacion_sin_plantilla: The center has not published the medication format yet.
errors.med_fuera_de_vigencia: Today must be within the medication dates to sign.
errors.med_caducada: You cannot authorise a medication whose end date has already passed.
errors.adm_registro_fallo: The administration could not be logged.
errors.adm_no_medicacion: This authorisation is not a medication.
errors.adm_no_permitido: You can't log this administration (the medication must be signed and valid today).
errors.adm_confirmar_fallo: The administration could not be confirmed.
errors.adm_confirmar_no_permitido: You can't confirm this administration (it must be confirmed by a staff member other than the one who administered it).
errors.revocar_no_permitido: You can only revoke pick-up and medication.
errors.archivar_no_permitido: You do not have permission to archive this medication.

catalogo.descripcion: The center's standard formats. Edit the text, mark it final and publish it.
catalogo.intro: Create the standard format for a type. Then write its text and publish it.
catalogo.vacio: No formats in the catalog yet.

instancias.descripcion: Sent or trip authorizations that families can sign.

enviar.intro: Take a published format and send it to an audience.
enviar.sin_plantillas: There are no published formats to send. Create one first.

recogida.dni_aviso: You can attach a photo of each person's ID (optional). It is stored securely and only the centre can see it.
recogida.dni_foto_fallo: Could not upload the ID photo.
recogida.intro: List who can pick up your child and sign. The regular list stays open; the one-off is valid only today.
recogida.rgpd_terceros: You are providing third-party data (name and ID of whoever picks up). The center processes it to verify pick-up; inform those people that their data is shared with the center.

medicacion.intro: Enter the medication, dose and schedule for your child and sign. The dates set the validity.
medicacion.vigencia_ayuda: The dates set the validity of the authorisation. Today must be within the range to sign.
medicacion.aviso: Health data of a minor. The center processes it to administer the medication per your authorisation. The report/prescription can be attached later.

administracion.intro: Record that you have administered this medication. It will stay pending until a second staff member confirms it.
administracion.aviso_doble: Double confirmation: a different staff member must confirm this administration.
administracion.espera_segundo: Waiting for a second staff member to confirm.

sin_acceso.descripcion: You can't view this authorisation. If you think this is a mistake, contact the centre.

excursion.intro: A field-trip authorisation hangs off a calendar event. Choose the trip.
excursion.sin_eventos: There are no field trips in the calendar. Create the trip (the event) first, then come back here for its authorisation.
excursion.crear_evento: Create field trip in the calendar
excursion.crear_otra: Not listed? Create a field trip in the calendar
excursion.texto_placeholder: Text families will sign (I authorise the trip…)

tipos_area.descripcion: The centre manages these 5 types. Four are catalogue formats; the field trip hangs off an event.
tipos_area.reglas_regimen_interno: Catalogue format. Sent to families to sign.
tipos_area.autorizacion_imagenes: Catalogue format. Image consent (signing in F11).
tipos_area.recogida: The family states who picks up the child and signs.
tipos_area.medicacion: The family authorises a medication with its schedule and signs.
tipos_area.salida: Field trip: hangs off a calendar event; no catalogue.

teacher.intro: Pick-ups and medication for the children in your classroom. Open one to record and confirm a medication administration.
teacher.recogidas_desc: Who may collect each child in your classroom (signed by the family).
teacher.recogidas_vacio: No pick-ups in your classroom yet.
teacher.medicacion_desc: Signed schedules. Open one to record or confirm an administration.
teacher.medicacion_vacio: No medication in your classroom yet.

seguimiento.pendientes_desc: What was sent and not all families have signed yet, with the specific child.
seguimiento.pendientes_vacio: Everything sent is signed. Nothing pending.
seguimiento.ultimas_desc: The 10 most recently sent or started authorizations.
seguimiento.ultimas_vacio: You have not sent any authorization yet.

nueva.modo_label: What do you want to create?

medicacion_lista.desc: Activity per schedule: doses given and pending confirmation.
medicacion_lista.dadas: {n, plural, one {# dose given} other {# doses given}}
medicacion_lista.pendientes_confirmar: {n, plural, one {# pending confirmation} other {# pending confirmation}}

avisos.pendientes_confirmar: {n, plural, one {You have # medication administration pending your confirmation} other {You have # medication administrations pending your confirmation}}
avisos.pendientes_firma: {n, plural, one {You have # authorisation pending your signature} other {You have # authorisations pending your signature}}
avisos.medicaciones_activas: {n, plural, one {# medication active today} other {# medications active today}}
avisos.nuevas_firmas: {n, plural, one {# new signature from a family has arrived} other {# new signatures from families have arrived}}
avisos.revocaciones: {n, plural, one {# authorization revoked: check pick-up / medication} other {# authorizations revoked: check pick-up / medication}}
avisos.por_archivar: {n, plural, one {# finished medication to archive} other {# finished medications to archive}}
avisos.informes_nuevos: {n, plural, one {There is # new development report} other {There are # new development reports}}
avisos.fotos_nuevas: {n, plural, one {There is # new post in the classroom blog} other {There are # new posts in the classroom blog}}
avisos.campana_pendientes: {n, plural, one {You have # report to complete} other {You have # reports to complete}} · due on {fecha}
avisos.campana_urgente: {n, plural, one {# report pending} other {# reports pending}} · due on {fecha}
avisos.campana_vencida: {n, plural, one {# report pending} other {# reports pending}} · was due on {fecha}
avisos.altas_pendientes_validar: {n, plural, one {# enrolment pending validation} other {# enrolments pending validation}}
avisos.recibos_nuevos: {n, plural, one {You have # new receipt} other {You have # new receipts}}

informes.title: Development reports
informes.admin_intro: Define your centre's report templates: the areas and items teachers will assess for each child.

plantillas.descripcion: Each template defines the report’s areas and items. You can have several (e.g. by age group).
plantillas.activas_vacio: You haven't created any templates yet.

form.escala_nota: Every item is rated on the same scale: Achieved / In progress / Not started.
form.sin_areas: Add at least one area with an item.

validation.sin_areas: Add at least one area with an item.
validation.area_titulo_largo: The area name is too long (max. 200).
validation.area_sin_items: Each area needs at least one item.
validation.item_vacio: The item text can't be empty.
validation.item_largo: The item text is too long (max. 500).

errors.no_autorizado: You don't have permission to manage report templates.
errors.creacion_fallo: The template could not be created.
errors.archivar_fallo: The template could not be archived.
errors.sin_curso_activo: There is no active academic year.
errors.plantilla_no_disponible: The chosen template is not available.
errors.guardado_fallo: The draft could not be saved.
errors.publicacion_fallo: The report could not be published.
errors.despublicacion_fallo: The report could not be unpublished.

campana.title: Report campaign
campana.admin_intro: Set a deadline per period and track report progress by classroom. The campaign coordinates, it does not block: reports are created and published the same whether or not a campaign exists.
campana.sin_curso_activo: There is no active academic year. Activate a year to open campaigns.
campana.sin_campanas: No campaigns yet. Open one to start tracking progress.
campana.lote_vacio: There were no reports to publish.

seguimiento.descripcion: Published reports versus children with an active enrolment, by classroom.
seguimiento.sin_aulas: There are no classrooms with enrolled children in this year.

validation.campana_duplicada: A campaign already exists for this period and year.

errors.no_autorizado: You do not have permission to manage report campaigns.
errors.sin_curso_activo: There is no active academic year.
errors.creacion_fallo: The campaign could not be opened.
errors.edicion_fallo: The deadline could not be updated.
errors.cierre_fallo: The campaign status could not be changed.
errors.lote_fallo: The reports could not be published.

informes.teacher_intro: Fill in and publish each child's development report for your class, by period.
informes.teacher_aula_vacia: There are no children enrolled in this class.
informes.family_intro: Check your children's published development reports.
informes.family_sin_informes_desc: When the school publishes a report for your child, it will appear here.

crear.sin_plantillas: The centre has no templates yet. Management must create one.

detalle.despublicar_nota: Unpublishing hides it from the family. When you publish again they are not notified anew.

fotos.title: Classroom photos
fotos.subtitulo: Share day-to-day moments with families. Only children with consent appear.

family.subtitulo: The photos shared by your child's classroom.

nino.ayuda: JPG or PNG, up to 4 MB. Location data is removed.

etiquetar.sin_ninos: No children with image consent in this classroom.

validation.tipo_no_permitido: File type not allowed. Use JPG or PNG.
validation.tamano_max: Each photo must be at most 4 MB.
validation.heic_no_soportado: Convert the photo to JPG or PNG before uploading it.

errors.no_autorizado: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.nino_sin_permiso: That child does not have image consent.

doc.titulo: A copy of your personal data — NIDO
doc.aviso: Links to files (photos, documents) expire ~24 h after this export is generated. The datos.json file contains the same data in a structured format (portability).

export.error: Could not generate the export. Please try again.
export.perfil_descripcion: Download a copy of your personal data and your children's (access and portability, GDPR).

consentimientos.datos_medicos_texto: I have read how my child's medical data is handled: the centre stores it encrypted and confidential, and only the teaching team and management access it for their care and safety.
consentimientos.imagen_nota: Image use consent is recorded later, when you sign the image authorisation.

imagen.sin_plantilla: The centre does not have an image authorisation template yet. This step will be completed later.
imagen.cargar_ayuda: Prepare the image authorisation to review and sign it.

completado.texto: You have completed {nombre}'s details. The centre will review them and activate the enrolment. We'll let you know when it's ready.

errors.no_autorizado: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.consentimiento_fallo: The consent could not be recorded. Please try again.
errors.finalizar_fallo: The enrolment could not be finished. Please try again.
errors.identidad_incompleta: Fill in the child's details first (name and date of birth).
errors.acuse_pendiente: Confirm the medical data confidentiality acknowledgement first.
errors.incompleto: Some required details are still missing.

acuses.normas_sin_plantilla: The centre hasn't published the rules to sign yet. This acknowledgement will be completed later.
acuses.privacidad_aceptada: You accepted the privacy notice when creating your account.

documentos.max_imagenes: You can upload up to {max} images (combined into one PDF).
documentos.libro_familia_ayuda: Upload one or more photos of the pages; they're combined into a single PDF.
documentos.dni_ayuda: Upload both sides of the document; they're combined into a single PDF.

errors.tipo_imagen: The file must be an image.
errors.imagen_invalida: The image could not be read.
errors.procesado: The document could not be processed.
errors.demasiadas_imagenes: Too many images for one document.
errors.subida: The document could not be uploaded. Please try again.
errors.tipo_pdf: The document must be a PDF.
errors.tamano: The document exceeds the maximum size (10 MB).
errors.guardado: The data could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.nombre: The name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.tutor_duplicado: This guardian already exists. Reload the page to see the current data.

validacion.enviado: Change sent to management for validation.

sepa.intro: Set up direct debit for fees. Enter the IBAN and sign the SEPA mandate. You can skip this step and provide it later.
sepa.iban_ayuda: The format and check digits are validated. Spanish accounts are 24 characters long.
sepa.nombre_tecleado_ayuda: Type your full name as a signing act, in addition to the drawn signature.
sepa.firma_presencial_aviso: Management mode: the mandate is recorded with paper backing, without a drawn signature. Confirm you hold the mandate physically signed by the family.
sepa.firma_presencial_nota: Signed on paper (physical backing held by the centre).
sepa.texto_legal: By signing this mandate, you authorise the creditor to send instructions to your bank to debit your account, and your bank to debit your account in accordance with those instructions. You are entitled to a refund from your bank under the terms and conditions of your agreement with it, within eight weeks of the debit date.

errors.nombre: Type your full name to sign
errors.guardado: Could not save the SEPA mandate

validacion.enviado: Change sent to management for validation.

alta.edicion_validada_aviso: This registration is already validated. Changes to sensitive data or documents will be sent to management for approval before they take effect.
alta.modo_direccion_aviso: Management mode — uploading documentation with paper backing. Signatures are recorded in your name as evidence that you hold the physically signed documents.

finalizar.exito: Registration complete. The school will review it.
finalizar.incompleto_titulo: Some required sections are still missing before you can finish:

validation.nombre_tutor_largo: The first name is too long
validation.apellidos_tutor_largo: The last name is too long

errors.no_en_espera: The prospect is no longer waiting.
errors.sin_email: The tutor’s email is required to invite.
errors.sin_curso_activo: The centre has no active academic year.
errors.aula_invalida: The selected classroom doesn't belong to the active year.
errors.tutor_ya_registrado: This email already has an account; no invitation was sent.
errors.colision_email_familia: That email already exists in this centre under the name {nombre}. Fix the email or details, or use the sibling enrolment.
errors.alta_fallo: The enrolment could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.sin_fecha_nacimiento: The child's date of birth is missing; fill it in before enrolling.

recibos.title: Receipts
recibos.family_intro: Check your children's receipts: amount, status and breakdown by item.
recibos.family_sin_recibos_desc: When the school generates receipts, they will appear here.
